headlines.title: Exclusive: Trump says Iran hasn't made a deal because ‘they’re strong’ and ‘proud’
headlines.description: President Trump sits down for an exclusive interview with Meet the Press as the U.S. looks to make a deal with Iran to end the war.

headlines.title: Why ceasefires haven’t stopped deadly strikes in Gaza, Lebanon or the Gulf
headlines.description: Across the Middle East, three separate ceasefire deals are currently in effect.

headlines.title: Israel faces growing pressure over alleged abuse of Gaza flotilla members
headlines.description: Israel faces mounting outrage over allegations of rape, beatings and humiliation of international activists detained on a flotilla attempting to break its naval blockade of Gaza.

headlines.title: Pentagon raised threat of Israeli spying on U.S. to highest level, sources say
headlines.description: WASHINGTON — The Pentagon is increasingly concerned about Israel ramping up its spying on the U.S., recently raising the counterintelligence threat level from America’s top ally in the Middle East to the highest level, according to two U.S. officials and one former U.S. official

headlines.title: Candace Owens and the Tate brothers turned up in Russia. The Kremlin spun it as a thaw.
headlines.description: Their appearance comes amid battlefield setbacks and dropping public sentiment in Russia.

headlines.title: Body of missing Auburn University student found in Japan
headlines.description: The body of an Auburn University student who had been missing in Japan for a week has been found in a mountainous area outside of Kyoto, according to his family

headlines.title: The next goal for weight loss drugs? Fewer injections
headlines.description: For millions of people taking weight loss drugs, the next breakthrough may not be more weight loss.

headlines.title: New Jersey police ramp up security as state prepares for World Cup final
headlines.description: As the World Cups heads to 11 cities across the U.S., states are ramping up security to keep fans safe. New Jersey police take NBC News' Sam Brock inside their command center, where they will monitor stadiums, hotels, and training centers ahead of and during matches.

headlines.title: Florida police share final report on Hulk Hogan’s cause of death
headlines.description: Terry Bollea — known professionally as Hulk Hogan — died of natural causes, according to a report released Friday by the Clearwater Police Department, concluding its investigation into the July 2025 death of the legendary pro wrestler.

headlines.title: Pope Leo says he ‘certainly’ will support the U.S. in the World Cup
headlines.description: The United States has the papal blessing for the World Cup.

headlines.title: AI’s elite celebrated in Washington as the public sours on data centers and chatbots
